case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. GLADIS CECILIA ZETINO SAMAYOA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE:FILE DESTROYED PER AUGUST 19,2021 ORDER
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,330.63 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAYOA, GLADIS CECILIA ZETINO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.00 - SERVED AUG-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAMAYOA, GLADIS CECILIA ZETINO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-19-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC., AND DEFENDANT GLADIS CECILIA ZETINO SAMAYOA. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER ENJI AVERILL ASSISTED MS. SAMAYOA AT TODAY'S PROCEEDINGS. PARTIES ATTENDED A MEDIATION SESSION CONDUCTED BY STUDENTS FROM THE HASTINGS LAW SCHOOL. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/19/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "REFUSED-RETURN TO SENDER-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PER 1-19-17 PROGRESS REPORT. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 08/19/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
